response.original_title: @@FAQHow do I get back my money from Binance?
response.overview: To get money back from Crypto.com, you must sell your cryptocurrency for fiat currency (USD, EUR, etc.) in the app, 🪐✨888✨633✨4176 link your bank account, and initiate a withdrawal to your bank via ACH or Wire. Funds usually arrive within 2-5 business days.
response.title: @@FAQHow do I get back my money from Binance?
